body.text:
{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323191607F60B6897E47DBD1AAFC9"}"},"total":2239},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7133579698990334751","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，精彩，追了也挺长时间了，中途也断追过，本想攒几个月看，一回来居然完结了，有点难受。毕竟谁都不喜欢烂尾，但前面写的真的很好，观看体验很好，非常爽。中间有的地方思绪有点乱。但是整体来说还是一个佳作，反正挺对我胃口的。有续集的话就更好了（我就是想想，不强求[飞吻]）可惜结束的有点快[哭][哭]作者以后继续加油[爱慕]五星"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1660916013,"group_id":"7002557451174153227","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"追书懒得分书架，成分很杂，书荒常客","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7dC1a8zlSDPZ/qVrUmWtZk=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/04db4aa9ec7f47b3b6db6b4031737353~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793394&x-signature=h2kxOTEHM1lJvgBb8PGDu%2BUIn28%3D","user_id":"73224594775","user_name":"纯阳坊市的郭支"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"73224594775","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7002557451174153227","book_info":{"abstract":"醉酒醒来，毕业于新东方餐饮学校的杨东浩，发现自己居然稀里糊涂穿越到了一个陌生的朝代——宋国。
于是。
爆米花成为了风靡都城，上至王公贵族，下到百姓贫民人人都喜欢的小吃。
蜜雪奶茶更是征服了胃口刁钻的公主和皇后。
至于煎饼果子、油条豆浆。
更是成为了皇帝每天的早餐。
民以食为天，治大国，若烹小鲜。
杨东浩随口一句话，竟然让他莫名其妙的站在了时代洪流中，最终成为了这个大时代中最璀璨耀眼的一颗星！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/41bd3eeea76de65f3fb28d0d90478cad","author":"股民小马","author_id":"","book_id":"7002557451174153227","book_name":"穿越大宋：我靠小吃杀疯了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3184人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":501,"name":"宋朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=501&name=宋朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7002559616588448259","read_count":"3184","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1161399"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"556","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,美食,宋朝","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/644b2b80ce020e5da7e6582c90b7f26a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779448567&x-signature=LpqC8jBLIV4d2ZH4CLaUNrLZ9oY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2805582286833128","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"7.3077811e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323191607F60B6897E47DBD1AAFC9"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读20小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":14,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":5,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":73082,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":9101},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7420468677240292158","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"耐看，文笔排版都很流畅，背景有过考察，包括细节物品描述非常到位。整体看下来非常不错，看书评有乱喷的，毕竟这也是小说，作者文中也说了，不是历史，虚构王朝。总体来说情绪调动，故事发展写的都不错。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1727717621,"group_id":"7002557451174153227","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"新人作家，尝试写玄幻类型的，喜欢的可以点点关注。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8rZe0NzF2SkgtTbpcS/ECc=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/76482a084abf49e0a8d882105583482c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796671&x-signature=rlE3OEkPvn9VPIhBrdGK6SelgBA%3D","user_id":"104697411175","user_name":"雪也会消失"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"104697411175","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1693567924,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7002557451174153227","book_info":{"abstract":"醉酒醒来，毕业于新东方餐饮学校的杨东浩，发现自己居然稀里糊涂穿越到了一个陌生的朝代——宋国。
于是。
爆米花成为了风靡都城，上至王公贵族，下到百姓贫民人人都喜欢的小吃。
蜜雪奶茶更是征服了胃口刁钻的公主和皇后。
至于煎饼果子、油条豆浆。
更是成为了皇帝每天的早餐。
民以食为天，治大国，若烹小鲜。
杨东浩随口一句话，竟然让他莫名其妙的站在了时代洪流中，最终成为了这个大时代中最璀璨耀眼的一颗星！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/41bd3eeea76de65f3fb28d0d90478cad","author":"股民小马","author_id":"","book_id":"7002557451174153227","book_name":"穿越大宋：我靠小吃杀疯了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3184人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":501,"name":"宋朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=501&name=宋朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7002559616588448259","read_count":"3184","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1161399"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"556","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,美食,宋朝","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/644b2b80ce020e5da7e6582c90b7f26a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779448567&x-signature=LpqC8jBLIV4d2ZH4CLaUNrLZ9oY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2805582286833128","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"36"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323191607F60B6897E47DBD1AAFC9"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5530,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2339},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7141922519250109192","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书真的挺好的，没有系统就凭着自己的才智能在古代做到如此已经很不错了，况且也是架空历史没必要太认真，还有很多方面的细节都写得非常好，龙蟠城的那几章我也被迷惑到了，结果后面是一个大反转，唯一不太好的估计就只有皇室里的描写了吧，这皇帝太容易被人左右了，容易听风就是雨，不过也能理解，皇帝的性子本来也就做摸不透嘛，也算可以了，结尾确实过于仓促了，但整体来说真的挺不错的，给作者点个赞，望以后写出更好的文章出来。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1662858512,"group_id":"7002557451174153227","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"想躺在一望无际的草原上慵懒散漫的吹风","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1qhNQpbW88psSvupPMGOPg+SI5xBxIRp/FkOD4/EzGY","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792384&x-signature=KUBTWgwKQKH0JBy2IKzfz54hBDI%3D","user_id":"4133778052363848","user_name":"北故人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4133778052363848","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7002557451174153227","book_info":{"abstract":"醉酒醒来，毕业于新东方餐饮学校的杨东浩，发现自己居然稀里糊涂穿越到了一个陌生的朝代——宋国。
